headline: Jim Cramer makes bold buy call on one booming energy stock
summary: When Jim Cramer says a stock is his favorite in a category and mentions it sits in his Charitable Trust as a "very big position," that is not a casual endorsement. Rather, it's a declaration of conviction. On Mad Money's Lightning Round on June 30, a caller asked about GE Vernova (GEV). Cramer did ...
